title: Implement GPTConfig struct
description: Create ExAutoresearch.Model.Config struct with: sequence_len (2048), vocab_size (8192), n_layer (8), n_head (6), n_kv_head (6), n_embd (768), window_pattern (SSSL), aspect_ratio (64), head_dim (128). Add derived field helpers: n_embd = n_layer * aspect_ratio.

title: Epic: Data Pipeline
description: Download HuggingFace parquet shards, tokenizer integration, best-fit packing dataloader producing Nx tensors

title: Wire up Jido.Agent with jido_ghcopilot
description: Create ExAutoresearch.Agent.Researcher implementing Jido.Agent. Use jido_ghcopilot in ACP mode for multi-turn reasoning. State machine: idle → planning → dispatching → training → evaluating → planning. Register tools from agent tool actions. Handle PubSub events from training completion.

title: Implement sliding window attention patterns
description: Add configurable per-layer attention window sizes. Parse window_pattern string (e.g. SSSL). S = half sequence length, L = full. Last layer always full. Modify causal mask to include window constraint. Support arbitrary patterns.

title: Epic: Advanced Training Features
description: Muon optimizer (Polar Express), sliding window attention, value embeddings (ResFormer), per-layer residual scaling

title: Add agent reasoning log
description: Show the LLM agent's reasoning in real-time: what it's thinking, why it chose this experiment, its keep/discard rationale. Subscribe to agent PubSub events. Display as a scrollable log with timestamps.

title: Epic: Distributed GPU Cluster
description: Multi-node GPU coordination: Cluster GenServer, LocalWorker (CUDA alongside ROCm), SSHBackend (remote nodes), parallel experiment dispatch

title: Port SSHBackend from basileus
description: Port Basileus.Cluster.SSHBackend. rsync compiled .beam files and EXLA cache to remote host. Generate boot.exs with EXLA config and app startup. Start BEAM via ssh -tt. Connect via distributed Erlang. Cleanup on terminate.

title: Implement causal multi-head attention
description: Implement CausalSelfAttention as Axon custom layer. Q/K/V projections via Axon.dense. Support grouped-query attention (n_kv_head < n_head). Apply RoPE to Q and K. Standard O(n²) dot-product attention with causal mask. Support configurable window size for sliding window attention (S=half, L=full). Output projection.

title: Epic: Agent Loop (Jido + Copilot)
description: LLM-driven experiment loop using jido_ghcopilot: analyze results, propose configs, dispatch training, evaluate BPB, keep/discard decisions

title: Epic: Training Loop
description: Time-budgeted training GenServer: forward/backward pass, gradient accumulation, LR scheduling, BPB evaluation, mixed precision bf16

title: Implement end-to-end experiment loop
description: Wire everything together: Agent starts → loads history → asks LLM for next experiment → dispatches training → waits for completion → evaluates BPB → asks LLM to decide keep/discard → saves to SQLite → loops. Add error handling, retry logic, and graceful shutdown.

title: Create Ash domain and experiment resources
description: Create ExAutoresearch.Research Ash domain. Resources: Experiment (id, status, config map, val_bpb, training_seconds, peak_vram_mb, total_tokens_m, num_steps, num_params_m, node, kept boolean, reasoning text, parent_id). ConfigSnapshot (id, config map, description, baseline boolean). Add to ash_domains in config.
close_reason: Ash domain + experiment resource with migration

title: Port Cluster GenServer from basileus
description: Port Basileus.Cluster to ExAutoresearch.Cluster. ETS-based capability registry. Auto-detect local GPU (nvidia-smi / rocm-smi). Heartbeat monitoring (30s interval, 90s stale threshold). best_node_for(:train) routing: prefer discrete GPU with most VRAM, then iGPU with most RAM, then least active. Node join/leave via :net_kernel.monitor_nodes.

title: Implement LR scheduler (warmup/warmdown)
description: Port the progress-based LR schedule from train.py. progress = elapsed_time / TIME_BUDGET. Warmup: linear 0→1 over warmup_ratio fraction. Warmdown: linear 1→final_lr_frac over warmdown_ratio fraction. Return multiplier to scale per-group LRs.

title: Implement MLP with ReLU²
description: Implement MLP block as Axon custom layer. Up-projection: n_embd → 4*n_embd. Activation: ReLU² = relu(x).square(). Down-projection: 4*n_embd → n_embd. Match train.py structure exactly.

title: Port Network utility from basileus
description: Port Basileus.Cluster.Network. Detect best local IP (prefer wired ethernet over wifi). local_ip_for/1 using kernel routing table. Support BASILEUS_IP env var override (rename to EX_AUTORESEARCH_IP).

title: Epic: Project Foundation
description: Set up mix.exs deps (xla_rocm, axon, polaris, jido, jido_ghcopilot), EXLA config, GPU_TARGET runtime switching, directory structure

title: Implement best-fit packing dataloader
description: Port the best-fit packing algorithm from prepare.py. Pack variable-length documents into fixed-length sequences (2048 tokens) with 0% padding. Prepend BOS token per document. Return {x, y} Nx tensors (input, target). Implement as GenServer yielding infinite batches. Support GPU transfer with EXLA backend.

title: Implement HuggingFace parquet downloader
description: Port prepare.py download logic. Use Req for HTTP streaming with exponential backoff retries (up to 5). Download from https://huggingface.co/datasets/karpathy/climbmix-400b-shuffle. Store in ~/.cache/ex_autoresearch/data/. Parallel downloads with Task.async_stream. Atomic writes (.tmp → rename).

title: Add per-layer residual scaling
description: Add learnable resid_lambdas (residual connection scaling) and x0_lambdas (skip connection from initial embedding). Initialize resid_lambdas=1.0, x0_lambdas=0.1. Apply per-layer during forward pass. Include in optimizer with scalar_lr group.

title: Implement value embeddings (ResFormer)
description: Add per-layer learnable value embeddings. Gated mixing: v = v + gate * ve where gate = 2 * sigmoid(linear(x)). Alternate which layers get value embeddings. Initialize gates to zero (sigmoid(0)=0.5 → neutral).

title: Add cluster status panel
description: Show GPU cluster status: each node with its capabilities (GPU type, VRAM, status online/offline, current job). Use PubSub cluster events for real-time updates. Show heartbeat age and highlight stale nodes.

title: Epic: GPT Model (Axon)
description: Implement GPT transformer model in Axon/Nx: attention with RoPE, MLP with ReLU², transformer blocks, embeddings, LM head, logit softcap
close_reason: GPT model and all children complete

title: Add BPB progress chart
description: Add a chart showing BPB over time (experiment sequence). Use a JS hook with a chart library (Chart.js or similar) or SVG-based Elixir charting. Highlight kept experiments in green, discarded in red. Show baseline as horizontal line.

title: Add jido + jido_ghcopilot deps
description: Add {:jido, path: "~/github/agentjido/jido"}, {:jido_ghcopilot, path: "~/github/agentjido/jido_ghcopilot"} and transitive deps (jido_action, jido_signal, jido_shell, jido_harness). Verify compilation.

title: Integrate BPE tokenizer
description: Option A: Use Bumblebee.load_tokenizer for a compatible GPT2-style tokenizer. Option B: Create a NIF wrapper around tiktoken. Must support encode/decode and byte-counting per token (for BPB metric). The original uses 8192 vocab with 4 special tokens.

title: Implement training GenServer
description: GenServer managing the training loop. Init: build model, init params, create optimizer state. Loop: forward pass (bf16), cross-entropy loss, backward pass, gradient accumulation (TOTAL_BATCH_SIZE / DEVICE_BATCH_SIZE steps), optimizer step. Time budget: stop after 300 seconds. Broadcast progress via PubSub. Return final model state.

title: Implement BPB evaluation metric
description: Port evaluate_bpb from prepare.py/train.py. Compute cross-entropy loss per token (reduction=none). Count UTF-8 bytes per token from tokenizer. BPB = sum(loss * mask) / (ln(2) * sum(bytes)). Evaluate on ~21M validation tokens. Return float BPB value.

title: Epic: LiveView Dashboard
description: Real-time experiment monitoring dashboard: experiment list/stream, BPB progress chart, cluster status, agent reasoning log, training metrics

title: Implement Muon optimizer
description: Implement Muon optimizer as Polaris-compatible update function. Polar Express orthogonalization via coefficient lookup table. NorMuon variance reduction per dimension. Separate handling: Muon for 2D matrix params, AdamW for everything else. Momentum warmup 0.85→0.95 over 300 steps. Cautious weight decay.

title: Implement parallel experiment dispatch
description: Modify experiment loop to dispatch N experiments in parallel (one per available GPU node). Use Cluster.best_node_for(:train) for routing. Collect results via :rpc.call or Task.async. Compare all BPB values, keep best. Coordinate with agent for batch experiment planning.

title: Create lib directory structure
description: Create directories: lib/ex_autoresearch/{model,training,data,agent,cluster,research}. Create placeholder modules with @moduledoc for each.

title: Configure EXLA backends in config/runtime.exs
description: Add GPU_TARGET env var switching (host/cuda/rocm). Configure EXLA clients with preallocate: false for rocm (iGPU shared RAM), preallocate: true for cuda (discrete). Set Nx default backend and defn compiler.

title: Assemble full GPT model
description: Build complete GPT model using Axon API. Token embedding (vocab_size → n_embd). N transformer blocks (RMS norm → attention → residual → RMS norm → MLP → residual). Final RMS norm. LM head (linear n_embd → vocab_size). Logit softcap: softcap * tanh(logits / softcap). Per-layer residual scaling (resid_lambdas, x0_lambdas). Weight initialization matching train.py distributions.

title: Port LocalWorker from basileus
description: Port Basileus.Cluster.LocalWorker. Spawn second BEAM with GPU_TARGET=cuda (or rocm) via Port.open. WORKER_ONLY=1 env to skip Phoenix. Share cookie for distributed Erlang. Await connection with retry. Forward stdout/stderr to Logger.

title: Add Nx/Axon/EXLA/Polaris deps to mix.exs
description: Add {:nx, "~> 0.10"}, {:exla, "~> 0.10"}, {:axon, "~> 0.7"}, {:polaris, "~> 0.1"} to deps. Add xla_rocm archive URL pattern from basileus. Set XLA_TARGET env switching.

title: Implement AdamW optimizer setup
description: Configure Polaris AdamW with per-parameter-group learning rates: embedding_lr=0.6, unembedding_lr=0.004, matrix_lr=0.04, scalar_lr=0.5. Weight decay=0.2 with linear decay schedule. Match betas=(0.8, 0.95) from train.py.

title: Port program.md as agent system prompt
description: Adapt autoresearch program.md for Elixir context. Include: available tools, hyperparameter ranges, experiment strategy (one change at a time), evaluation criteria (BPB lower is better), cluster awareness. Store as embedded string or file read at startup.

title: Define agent tool actions
description: Create Jido.Action modules: ReadResults (query SQLite experiments), ProposeConfig (pass to LLM), StartTraining (dispatch to Trainer), EvaluateResult (compare BPB), KeepExperiment (mark as kept in DB), DiscardExperiment (mark discarded), GetClusterStatus (list nodes). Each action must implement the Jido.Action behaviour with run/2.

title: Implement Rotary Position Embeddings (RoPE)
description: Implement apply_rotary_emb as Nx.Defn function. Precompute cos/sin frequency tables for max_seq_len. Split Q/K tensors into pairs, rotate by position-dependent angles. Match the exact formula from train.py: x0*cos - x1*sin, x0*sin + x1*cos.

title: Create DashboardLive with experiment stream
description: Create ExAutoresearchWeb.DashboardLive at route /. Use LiveView streams for experiment list. Show: id, status, config summary, val_bpb, node, kept/discarded, timestamp. Subscribe to PubSub for real-time updates. Use Tailwind for clean dashboard layout.
